name: demo/clean-tools
description: Mirror of vulnerable-setup, written correctly — should not trigger critical/high/medium

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Writes content to a file inside the allowed project directory.

path.description: Relative path within the project folder, e.g. notes/todo.md

tools.name: check_job_status
tools.description: Returns the status of a scheduled background job by ID. Does not execute shell commands.

jobId.description: Opaque job identifier returned by schedule_task

tools.name: read_notes
tools.description: Reads a note by ID from the project notes store.

prompts.name: summarize
prompts.description: Summarize the document in plain language for the user.

resources.name: policy
resources.description: Company policy document for internal reference.
